name: Marincess Snow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海晶乙女雪花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリンセス・スノー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a "Marincess" Link Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: Target 1 of those monsters; Special Summon 1 "Marincess" Link Monster from your Extra Deck with a lower Link Rating than that monster. (This is treated as a Link Summon.) It is unaffected by your opponent's card effects while you control it. You can only activate 1 "Marincess Snow" per turn.
eff: If a "Marincess" Link Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: Target 1 of those monsters; Special Summon 1 "Marincess" Link Monster from your Extra Deck with a lower Link Rating than that monster. (This is treated as a Link Summon.) It is unaffected by your opponent's card effects while you control it. You can only activate 1 "Marincess Snow" per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Link Summon
